text.title: Laravel Decomposition Failure Modes
text.summary: 6 antipatterns observed in real Laravel codebases applying the decomposition pattern. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Controller swells back to 400 lines within one sprint after the convention is adopted.
antipattern.root-cause: Agents skip the Action layer under deadline pressure ("just add an endpoint quickly").
antipattern.fix: Lock the convention in `CONTRIBUTING.md` and reference it in every system prompt. Run `decomp-lint.sh` in CI; block merges on controller LOC > 150.

antipattern.symptom: `CreateUserDTO::$firstName` and `User::$first_name` diverge; insert succeeds with NULL first name.
antipattern.root-cause: Two agents added the same field with different naming conventions; no canonical mapper.
antipattern.fix: Enforce snake_case in DB + camelCase only inside DTOs, with one canonical `::fromRequest` factory. Add a serialization assertion in feature tests.

antipattern.root-cause: Resource implementation calls `$this->all()` or spreads attributes.
antipattern.fix: Switch to an explicit field list; add a feature test that asserts the response keys exactly match the expected set.

antipattern.symptom: Queue job that depends on the just-created entity has to refetch it from the DB or duplicates the Action's logic.
antipattern.root-cause: Action declared `execute(): void`, mutating state without returning the canonical entity.
antipattern.fix: Return the canonical entity or a result object. Add a static analyser rule (`phpstan`) that flags `execute(): void`.

antipattern.symptom: `App\Managers\UserManager`, `App\Coordinators\BillingCoordinator`, `App\Handlers\OrderHandler` appear after refactors; the convention dissolves.
antipattern.root-cause: Agents invent layers without an ADR.
antipattern.fix: Enforce a namespace whitelist via `decomp-lint.sh`. New namespaces require an ADR PR.

antipattern.symptom: `CreateUserAction::execute()` calls `SendWelcomeEmailAction::execute()` inline; email failure rolls back user creation unexpectedly.
antipattern.root-cause: Agent composed two Actions inside one transaction without declaring side-effects.
antipattern.fix: Multi-step flows go in a Service class that orchestrates Actions; emails dispatched via queued jobs after the transaction commits (`DB::afterCommit`).
